metadata.title: Zohal — Bilingual Contract Analyst for Saudi Firms
metadata.description: Zohal catches conflicting dates, risky clauses, and translation mistakes in Arabic and English contracts, then exports a verified decision pack with exact evidence.

brand.name: Zohal
brand.tagline: The bilingual contract analyst for Saudi firms.

hero.headline: The First Bilingual Contract Analyst for Saudi Firms.
hero.subhead: Zohal catches conflicting dates, risky clauses, and translation mistakes that generic AI misses. Upload a contract and get a verified decision pack your team can review and send.
hero.proofLine: No credit card • Arabic + English review • Exact page and clause for every finding

credibilityStrip.label: Built for contract review that must hold up.

problem.title: Don't let a typo cost you a client.
body: You do not have an army of associates checking every page, every amendment, and every translation before a memo goes out.
Zohal does more than summarize. It verifies each finding against the source, shows the exact page and clause, and flags conflicts before they become client-facing mistakes.

howItWorks.title: From messy PDF to client-ready memo in minutes.
howItWorks.subhead: The workflow is simple: upload the file, review the conflicts, then export a clean decision pack.

steps.title: Upload Anything
steps.body: Scanned PDFs, photo attachments, signature pages, and bilingual contracts all go through the same intake flow.

steps.title: Zohal Finds the Facts
steps.body: Key terms like dates, parties, liability, term, and governing law are extracted and linked back to the source text.

steps.title: Review the Conflict Radar
steps.body: Zohal flags contradictions across the main agreement, amendments, annexes, and translations before you send the memo.

steps.title: Export and Send
steps.body: Download a branded decision pack in PDF or Word and send it directly to the client after review.

items.label: To reach a first review pack

stats.footnote: Final legal judgment stays with your team. Zohal speeds up review and makes evidence easier to verify.

capabilities.title: What your team sees, not technical jargon.

tabs.label: Verified Facts
tabs.title: Key legal facts in plain language.
bullets: Party names, dates, term, liability, and governing law are presented as review-ready legal fields
Each fact stays tied to the page where it was found
Unclear fields stay marked for review instead of being guessed

tabs.label: Conflict Radar
tabs.title: Contradictions are obvious before they reach the client.
bullets: Amendments that disagree with the master agreement are surfaced immediately
Cross-language differences are shown as review items, not hidden in summaries
The team reviews exceptions instead of re-reading every page from scratch

tabs.label: Bilingual Review
tabs.title: Arabic and English checked in one place.
bullets: Mixed layouts, stamps, tables, and scans are handled in the same review flow
Arabic and English evidence can be checked side by side
Translation mistakes are surfaced with source-linked proof

tabs.label: Decision Packs
tabs.title: A memo you can actually send.
bullets: Verified findings, conflicts, and evidence are packaged into a clean summary
Exports are designed for internal review or direct client delivery
The output looks like legal work product, not raw AI output

tabs.label: Review Controls
tabs.title: Your team stays in control of the final answer.
bullets: Review checkpoints keep important findings from shipping unchecked
History makes it clear what changed and what still needs attention
Access stays limited to the people working on the matter

cards.title: Contract Review
cards.subtitle: Catch renewal terms, liability language, and hidden conflicts before they reach the partner.
bullets: Dates, parties, term, governing law, liability, and termination clauses
Clause-level evidence for each highlighted finding
Clean memo output for partner review

cards.title: Amendments and Side Letters
cards.subtitle: Check what changed without re-reading the full stack manually.
bullets: Master agreement versus amendment comparison
Conflicting terms surfaced as explicit review items
Clear handoff for final legal judgment

cards.title: Bilingual Contracts
cards.subtitle: Review Arabic and English versions together before anything is sent out.
bullets: Side-by-side evidence for both languages
Layout-aware handling for scans, stamps, and annexes
Translation mismatches surfaced early

cards.title: In-House Counsel
cards.subtitle: Get to a documented first pass faster when the business needs an answer now.
bullets: Fast first-pass review with evidence links
Decision packs that are easy to share with stakeholders
Clear record of what was checked and what needs escalation

decisionPack.title: A decision pack you can send to the client.
bullets: Executive summary with verified findings in plain legal language
Conflict list with exact page references for faster review
Key facts table linked to the source text
Export options built for PDF and Word handoff

security.title: Saudi-native security for client work.
leftBullets: KSA-ready data residency controls for firms that need local handling
Zero-training policy: client documents are not used to train models
Each export carries a manifest of what was checked and when
Workspace-based access and review history for controlled collaboration
Clear handling when evidence is missing or contradictory

rightCard.title: Built for confidential matters
bullets: Evidence stays linked to the source inside the workspace
Review history makes changes easy to audit
Access can stay limited to the active matter team
Exports remain structured for internal review or client delivery

pricing.title: One plan for the firms we serve.

professional.name: The Partner Plan
bullets: Billed annually for boutique firms and in-house counsel
Unlimited contract uploads
Full bilingual analysis (Arabic/English)
Conflict and discrepancy radar
Client-ready decision pack exports
KSA-ready data residency controls

usageMeter.title: Billing note
usageMeter.body: Annual billing. 14-day free trial. Contact us if you need multi-team rollout or higher-volume matters.

insights.title: What firms use Zohal for.
insights.subhead: The common review jobs where proof matters more than another generic summary.

items.title: Lease reviews with conflicting renewal dates
items.excerpt: Catch date conflicts across the main agreement and later amendments before the memo is sent.

items.title: Arabic/English contract checks before signature
items.excerpt: Compare both language versions and surface translation differences with linked evidence.

items.title: Fast first-pass review for amendment stacks
items.excerpt: Turn a messy bundle into a short, reviewable pack that highlights only what changed.

cta.label: Talk to us about your workflow

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: If your question is not here, contact us and we will reply within one business day.

items.q: How does Zohal keep findings trustworthy?
items.a: Each finding stays tied to the source page and clause. If evidence is weak, missing, or contradictory, Zohal marks it for review instead of presenting it as settled.

items.q: What happens when the contract and amendment conflict?
items.a: Zohal flags the contradiction as a review item and points to both locations so your team can resolve it intentionally before exporting the memo.

items.q: Does it support Arabic and English contracts together?
items.a: Yes. The review flow is designed for bilingual documents, including mixed layouts, scans, annexes, and stamped pages.

items.q: What do we actually send to the client?
items.a: You export a structured decision pack with verified facts, flagged conflicts, and linked evidence in a format that is easy to review internally or share externally.

items.q: Do you use our client files to train models?
items.a: No. Zohal follows a zero-training policy for client documents.

contactRow.note: Need a sample pack for your practice area? Contact us and we will tailor one.

finalCta.title: Review faster. Miss less. Send with proof.
finalCta.subhead: Upload the contract, review the conflicts, and export a decision pack your client can trust.

footer.legalNote: Watd Information Technology Company provides evidence-backed workflow assistance. Your team remains responsible for legal review and final approvals.

ui.mentalModelLine: Upload Contract -> Review Conflicts -> Export Memo

modal.demoShowsBody: verified facts, flagged conflicts, and export-ready formatting.

mock.exceptionsQueueBody: Page 4 says "30 days" but Page 12 says "60 days".
